raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.5": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identifies the main conceptual issue with the section: it contradicts itself about its central contribution.",
    "R1.5": "The agent suggests reorganizing the section to lead with the scheduling problem and motivate the storage layout as an enabling mechanism, but does not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan.",
    "RX.1": "The agent accurately flags uncertainty for several clearly out-of-reach claims, including the O(1) amortized random-read cost claim.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift: it mentions Delta Lake but does not provide a clear comparison.",
    "RX.4": "The agent correctly identifies that the output is harm-free but notes one minor regression (the likely-wrong characterization of Delta Lake).",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, including the specific citations and references."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies the main conceptual issue with the section: it contradicts itself about its central contribution.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests reorganizing the section to lead with the scheduling problem and motivate the storage layout as an enabling mechanism, but does not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan.
rationale.RX.1: The agent accurately flags uncertainty for several clearly out-of-reach claims, including the O(1) amortized random-read cost claim.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift: it mentions Delta Lake but does not provide a clear comparison.
rationale.RX.4: The agent correctly identifies that the output is harm-free but notes one minor regression (the likely-wrong characterization of Delta Lake).
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, including the specific citations and references.
